name: Storage account minimum TLS version below 1.2
description: A storage account allows TLS versions below 1.2. TLS 1.0 and 1.1 have known vulnerabilities (POODLE, BEAST) and are deprecated. Microsoft will enforce TLS 1.2 minimum across Azure services.
remediation: Set MinimumTlsVersion=TLS1_2 on all storage accounts. Use Azure Policy to enforce this at scale. Update any clients that require older TLS versions.
